title: Transformers are Bayesian Networks
summary: arXiv:2603.17063v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Transformers are the dominant architecture in AI, yet why they work remains poorly understood. summary: arXiv:2603.17683v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents deployed in unknown environments must learn task structure at test time, but current approaches require thousands of interactions to form useful hypotheses. title: MALLES: A Multi-agent LLMs-based Economic Sandbox with Consumer Preference Alignment
summary: arXiv:2603.17694v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In the real economy, modern decision-making is fundamentally challenged by high-dimensional, multimodal environments, which are further complicated by agent heterogeneity and combinatorial data sparsity.
